name: AWS EC2 Instance Metadata Defaults Modified
description: This model detects the use of the ModifyInstanceMetadataDefaults API call, which indicates a change to the default Instance Metadata Service (IMDS) settings applied to newly launched EC2 instances. Modifying these defaults can weaken security controls, such as disabling IMDSv2 enforcement or enabling legacy metadata access. Monitoring this activity is important because insecure defaults can expose future EC2 instances to credential theft, metadata exploitation, or unauthorized access at scale.

rules.name: AWS EC2 Instance Metadata Defaults Modified

author: Srivathsa H S
